scripts.start: node scripts/ensure-electron-path.mjs && cross-env INDICOINK_ISOLATED_USER_DATA=1 INDICOINK_PERSISTENCE_DB_PATH=.indicoink-dev-data/indicoink-persistence.sqlite3 ELECTRON_CONFIG_CACHE=.electron-cache electron_config_cache=.electron-cache ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache ELECTRON_OVERRIDE_DIST_PATH=node_modules/electron/dist electron-forge start
scripts.import:fixture: node scripts/ensure-electron-path.mjs && cross-env INDICOINK_ISOLATED_USER_DATA=1 INDICOINK_PERSISTENCE_DB_PATH=.indicoink-dev-data/indicoink-persistence.sqlite3 ELECTRON_CONFIG_CACHE=.electron-cache electron_config_cache=.electron-cache ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache ELECTRON_OVERRIDE_DIST_PATH=node_modules/electron/dist electron-forge start
scripts.start:gpu: node scripts/ensure-electron-path.mjs && cross-env INDICOINK_ISOLATED_USER_DATA=1 INDICOINK_PERSISTENCE_DB_PATH=.indicoink-dev-data/indicoink-persistence.sqlite3 INDICOINK_DISABLE_GPU=1 ELECTRON_CONFIG_CACHE=.electron-cache electron_config_cache=.electron-cache ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache ELECTRON_OVERRIDE_DIST_PATH=node_modules/electron/dist electron-forge start
scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-electron-path.mjs && cross-env INDICOINK_ISOLATED_USER_DATA=1 INDICOINK_PERSISTENCE_DB_PATH=.indicoink-dev-data/indicoink-persistence.sqlite3 ELECTRON_CONFIG_CACHE=.electron-cache electron_config_cache=.electron-cache ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache ELECTRON_OVERRIDE_DIST_PATH=node_modules/electron/dist electron-forge start
scripts.package: node scripts/ensure-electron-path.mjs && cross-env ELECTRON_CONFIG_CACHE=.electron-cache electron_config_cache=.electron-cache ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache ELECTRON_OVERRIDE_DIST_PATH=node_modules/electron/dist electron-forge package
scripts.make: node scripts/ensure-electron-path.mjs && cross-env ELECTRON_CONFIG_CACHE=.electron-cache electron_config_cache=.electron-cache ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache ELECTRON_OVERRIDE_DIST_PATH=node_modules/electron/dist electron-forge make
scripts.build: node scripts/ensure-electron-path.mjs && cross-env ELECTRON_CONFIG_CACHE=.electron-cache electron_config_cache=.electron-cache ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache ELECTRON_OVERRIDE_DIST_PATH=node_modules/electron/dist electron-forge package
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run test:e2e
